title: routerescalation labels view
description: Layer 2 of the two-layer dataset (ADR-0006): a derived, per-task training record. Regenerable from the raw measurement log; not primary data. One JSON object per task. ERROR/SKIPPED-only tiers are 'unmeasured' and excluded from the label; a task with no measured passing tier has minimum_viable_tier 'NONE' (inv-error-unmeasured, inv-labels-contract).

task_id.description: Stable identifier grouping all measurements of one task.

minimum_viable_tier.description: The lowest-capability tier with a measured PASS, or NONE when no tier passes.

per_tier_verdicts.description: Resolved verdict per tier after BR-2 de-dup: PASS or FAIL for a measured tier, 'unmeasured' for a tier whose only outcomes were ERROR or SKIPPED.

tier_model_map.description: Concrete model id backing each tier, taken from the latest attempt of that tier.

flaky.description: BR-2 fail-safe: tiers whose measured attempts disagreed (a PASS and a FAIL both observed). Present only when at least one tier is flaky. ERROR/SKIPPED attempts are unmeasured and never count as disagreement.
